meaning: n.饲养员,奶瓶,进料器,馈电线,支流
examples: The feeder fed new feed to pigs so that they put on fat.
Air India is one of only a handful of large airlines without a big domestic feeder airline.
The fish were placed in a tank with two feeders, one of which supplied a lot more food than the other, known as the "rich feeder".
And plus, Syria saw Lebanon as a feeder from which it could put pressure on Israel.
Add a hummingbird feeder, and Harrison says the birds will return year after year.
